name: zvideo_dd_lock_directdraw_surface
description: zVideo_dd::LockDirectDrawSurface zeroes and sizes a DDSURFACEDESC, locks a DirectDraw surface with DDLOCK_WAIT, restores and retries when the surface is lost, and reports unrecovered DirectDraw errors.
known_limits: The current VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs target zvideo_primary_blit_directdraw did not produce the expected COFF symbol ?LockDirectDrawSurface@zVideo_dd@@YIHPAUIDirectDrawSurface3@@PAUDDSURFACEDESC@@@Z for comparison, so Binary-safe remains false pending manifest/source-shape work.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly for 0x4a8060 clears 0x6c bytes of the output DDSURFACEDESC, writes dwSize = 0x6c, calls IDirectDrawSurface3::Lock through vtable offset 0x64 with null rect, the descriptor, DDLOCK_WAIT, and null event, returns zero on DD_OK, calls Restore through vtable offset 0x6c on DDERR_SURFACELOST, retries Lock when Restore succeeds, and reports other HRESULT failures with zVideo_dd::ReportError using zvid_dd.c line 0x1b9 before returning 0x5a56ffff.
Binary Ninja decompilation for 0x4a8060 has no warnings and matches the implemented descriptor setup, DirectDraw Lock call, lost-surface restore/retry loop, and error return.

The native smoke installs a fake IDirectDrawSurface3 vtable and verifies the direct DD_OK lock path plus the DDERR_SURFACELOST, Restore DD_OK, retry Lock DD_OK path, including null rect/event arguments, DDLOCK_WAIT, descriptor dwSize initialization, returned surface dimensions, pitch, and pixels.
